git_sha_at_freeze_note: The freeze SHA is the git commit that introduces this file. Runner derives it via: git log --format=%H -1 -- output/phase_p_preregistration.json. Any uncommitted edits to this file must FAIL the runner gate.
purpose: Freeze all Phase P (Purpose Return) hypotheses, thresholds, horizons, gate variants, and exclusion filters BEFORE any backtest code is executed. Runner MUST validate this file's existence and git ancestry; else exit(1). Prevents FP-001 post-hoc criterion relaxation.

data_snapshots.note: 12 pipeline snapshots verified: each contains both output/decision.json and output/final_results.json. Regression tests use these snapshots verbatim, no synthetic fixtures (FIX-G).

external_anchors.rationale: OL-7 anti-confirmation-bias — evaluation uses independent price source, never the pipeline's internal features

P-4.question: decision.json signals vs buy-and-hold — was signal-following better?

signal_gate_variants.rule: act on every BUY/SELL regardless of confidence
act on BUY/SELL only when confidence_pct >= 60
sensitivity check; act only when confidence_pct >= 70

benchmarks.rule: 50% index + 50% cash rebalanced at snapshot dates
avg exposure of unconditional signal * index + rest cash

success_criteria.primary: gated Sharpe > buy_and_hold Sharpe by any positive margin (report exact numbers; no statistical claim due to N=12)
success_criteria.secondary: gated cumulative return >= buy_and_hold OR MDD < buy_and_hold MDD
success_criteria.sample_size_note: N=12 snapshots. Sharpe SE ≈ 1.6 (per analysis-agent). No p-value asserted; report descriptively.

P-1.question: Do top-weighted indicators forecast index direction better than bottom-weighted?
P-1.reason_for_descriptive: N=12 snapshots, 5d forward available for at most 6 → effective inferential N < 30. Analysis-agent's minimum viable pooled N is ~60.
P-1.metric: top_group_hit_rate vs bottom_group_hit_rate, where hit = sign(sum(signal * signed_r)) matches sign(index_forward_return)

success_criteria.descriptive: report both hit rates + Wilson 90% CI + delta; no p-value asserted
success_criteria.note: Prompt originally required p<0.05 with N>=30; infeasible today. Do NOT relax criterion; report as data-insufficient.

P-2.question: Did snapshot's contribution_top5 predict next-window top contributors?
P-2.original_prompt_definition_flaw: Prompt asks 'was Top5 actual contribution leader on snapshot day?' — but contribution_top5 is computed over PAST 249 days ending at snapshot. Same-day comparison is tautological (Analysis-agent P-3 finding).
P-2.corrected_definition: precision@5 = |snapshot_contribution_top5 ∩ empirically_top5_over_forward_window| / 5, where empirical Top5 = market-cap-weighted return contribution over T+1..T+5 (forward window, computed from external yfinance/FDR prices)

sources.actual_top5_computation: external prices via yfinance/FDR; universe = all tickers appearing in any snapshot's top5 union

success_criteria.descriptive: report mean precision@5 + per-snapshot values; chance baseline note (5/universe_size)

P-3.question: Did beneficiary_top5 outperform benchmark on forward window?

exclusion_filter.reason: flagged by pipeline for suspicious past return

P-3.metric: forward_return_5d - benchmark_return_5d (excess), averaged across surviving Top5

success_criteria.descriptive: report mean excess + hit rate + per-snapshot values
success_criteria.note: Prompt required 20d excess > 0 + win_rate > 50%; horizon infeasible today. Report data-insufficient.

multiple_testing.applied_to: not applied (all tests are descriptive-only due to sample-size constraints); documented for future inferential re-run when N>=60

runner_gate_rule.requirement: any script implementing P-1..P-4 must (a) read this file, (b) verify frozen_at is set and git_sha_at_freeze is an ancestor of HEAD, (c) assert own params match this file — else sys.exit(1)

level_8_evidence_requirement.rule: Each P-* must produce: exit code, printed numeric summary line, JSON output file with metrics, one regression test using real snapshots (FIX-G)

post_execution_rules.no_criterion_relaxation: If a success criterion fails, report failure + decompose cause. Do NOT edit this file to lower the threshold (FP-001).
post_execution_rules.criterion_change_protocol: Only allowed via new pre-registration file with new frozen_at; old file preserved.
post_execution_rules.roadmap_registration: Any failed metric or infeasible horizon must be registered as ROADMAP improvement item with specific formula fix proposal.
